reviews.review_description: This game is an obvious cash grab. The tutorial is very low quality and doesn’t go over the fact that you need a lot of farms to support your army. Theres also only one map? The entire time I was playing I had pop ups to buy resources. The developers throw the purchases in your face and expect you to buy them. If you attack a base with your extremely hungry army all of the high levels die and then I can’t progress because the enemies can easily ￼beat my low level troops putting me into a cycle. I think with a better ui and optimization this game would be perfect

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're sorry the experience felt frustrating. This is a strategy game where managing resources, farms, and army growth is an important part of progression, but we understand that some mechanics may not be explained clearly enough.

We appreciate your comments about the tutorial, UI, optimization, and game balance, and we'll keep working to improve these areas. Resource purchases are entirely optional, and we'll continue looking for ways to make progression feel more rewarding for all players.

Thanks again for your honest feedback and suggestions.

reviews.review_title: Only has 1 level just a cash grab
reviews.review_description: You cant make enough resources to make troops for free when you run out your spammed with buy 10k stone/wood/food/iron for 99p a material just wasted an extra £2 to get the iron and food finished game said it would restart me with same amount it didnt waste of time and effort.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. This is a strategy game where choosing the right balance between economy, troop management, and expansion is key to success. Paid resources are completely optional and designed only as a way to speed up progression or support different play styles. We’ll continue improving balance to make the experience more rewarding for all players.

reviews.review_description: this is my favorite game because you don't need to be one of the characters if you have stick drifts so you move not all the time

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your feedback!!!  
We are very glad to see that you are enjoying the game.❤️

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your feedback! It would be great to hear your ideas for improving the game.
Hi! Could you please clarify a bit what the problem is? We'll try to help you:)

reviews.review_description: Why is my food going down for some reason but everything good

developer_response.body:
Hi! If you've already created an army, it needs food, so the food supply decreases, you need to build a farm. 
If we misunderstood the question, please clarify it.

reviews.review_description: i messed aswell pls help me devs

developer_response.body: We'll be more than happy to help you! :) Tell us more about what exactly is confusing you?
